title: Costs
noCostsDescription: Cost data will appear once agents start running.
heartbeatsPaused: Heartbeats are paused for this scope until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
pageDescription: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
selectCompanyToViewCosts: Select a company to view costs.
selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.
inferenceLedgerDescription: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
budgetConsumed: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
financeLedgerDescription: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
byAgentDescription: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
byProjectDescription: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
noFinanceEvents: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
budgetControlPlaneDescription: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
resolveActiveIncidents: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
agentBudgetDesc: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
projectBudgetDesc: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
noBudgetPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.
noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
byBillerDescription: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
